steps.title: Translate the English into an inequality
steps.content:
The phrase describes $x$ as being at most some value.

That value is 19 less than 4 times $y$, which is $4y - 19$.

Therefore:
$$x \leq 4y - 19$$

steps.title: Substitute y = 4 and solve for the greatest x
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 4$:
$$x \leq 4(4) - 19$$
$$x \leq 16 - 19$$
$$x \leq -3$$
The greatest possible value of $x$ is $-3$.
